final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: presentation-cover
Asset type: PPT cover slide, 16:9 landscape
Primary request: premium automotive launch announcement for Changan Origin Q06, September release
Scene/backdrop: abstract light tunnel or flowing energy streams, soft gradient from deep navy to electric blue, subtle particle effects suggesting motion and innovation
Subject: clean typography layout with "长安起源Q06" as main headline and "9月震撼上市" as subheadline, elegant Chinese characters with modern sans-serif styling
Style/medium: minimalist corporate design, premium automotive brand aesthetic, subtle 3D depth
Composition/framing: centered text layout with generous negative space, headline upper-middle, subheadline below with breathing room
Lighting/mood: ethereal backlighting with soft glow, inspiring and forward-looking atmosphere
Color palette: deep navy blue base, electric blue accents, silver/white text, subtle gradient transitions
Materials/textures: smooth glass-like surfaces, soft bokeh light particles, clean matte finish
Text (verbatim): "长安起源Q06将于9月上市"
Constraints: maintain brand premium feel, ensure text legibility against background, keep Chinese characters crisp and professional
Avoid: cluttered layout, overly busy patterns, hard shadows, stock photo clichés, watermark
